name: IMPACT BIOMEDICAL INC.
business: IMPACT BIOMEDICAL INC. is a human healthcare and consumer wellness company with no significant revenue, developing drug candidates and over-the-counter consumer products and providing clinical analytics services.

exposures.sentence: To achieve profitability, we must successfully develop, register and commercialize multiple technologies in biopharmaceuticals and over the counter consumer products.
To achieve profitability, we must successfully develop, register and commercialize multiple technologies in biopharmaceuticals and over the counter consumer products.
To date, we have not generated any revenue and we may not generate any revenue from sales of our clinical analytics services or drug candidates for the foreseeable future.
